skills.name: devweekly-agents-md
skills.description: Project-wide operating rules for AI agents working on the Dev Weekly Astro blog. Covers tech stack, content schema, mandatory self-maintenance, code style, and common commands.

skills.name: devweekly-claude-md
skills.description: Claude-specific guidance for this repository: common pnpm commands, Astro/React/Tailwind/TypeScript conventions, naming rules, and styling preferences.

skills.name: devweekly-pi-md
skills.description: Pi agent guide with project-specific commands, path aliases, content naming conventions, and validation steps for the Dev Weekly blog.

skills.name: devweekly-warp-md
skills.description: WARP terminal guidance for navigating the Astro project, content collections, routing, component architecture, and styling system.

skills.name: devweekly-api-catalog
skills.description: RFC 9727 API catalog pointing to RSS feed, search, posts, tags, about page, and agent skills index.
